mapper.sql: sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_record ( user_id, session_id, question_id, audio_url, transcript, fluency_and_coherence, lexical_resource, grammatical_range_and_accuracy, pronunciation, overall_score, feedback, answer_status, is_deleted, deleted_time, ai_status, ai_provider, ai_model, ai_error_message, relevance_comment, quality_comment, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{questionId}, #{audioUrl}, #{transcript}, #{fluencyAndCoherence}, #{lexicalResource}, #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, #{pronunciation}, #{overallScore}, #{feedback}, #{answerStatus}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedTime}, #{aiStatus}, #{aiProvider}, #{aiModel}, #{aiErrorMessage}, #{relevanceComment}, #{qualityComment}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.id = #{id} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sr.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sr.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY sr.deleted_time DESC, sr.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sr.created_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record sr LEFT JOIN speaking_question sq ON sr.question_id = sq.id

SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time, sq.part FROM speaking_record sr LEFT JOIN speaking_question sq ON sr.question_id = sq.id
ORDER BY sr.created_time
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record sr

SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time FROM speaking_record sr
ORDER BY sr.deleted_time
ASC DESC
, sr.created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record sr LEFT JOIN speaking_question sq ON sr.question_id = sq.id

SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time, sq.part FROM speaking_record sr LEFT JOIN speaking_question sq ON sr.question_id = sq.id
ORDER BY sr.created_time
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record sr

SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time FROM speaking_record sr
ORDER BY sr.deleted_time
ASC DESC
, sr.created_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.ai_status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY sr.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_record SET audio_url = #{audioUrl}, transcript = #{transcript}, fluency_and_coherence = #{fluencyAndCoherence}, lexical_resource = #{lexicalResource}, grammatical_range_and_accuracy = #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, pronunciation = #{pronunciation}, overall_score = #{overallScore}, feedback = #{feedback}, answer_status = #{answerStatus}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, deleted_time = #{deletedTime}, ai_status = #{aiStatus}, ai_provider = #{aiProvider}, ai_model = #{aiModel}, ai_error_message = #{aiErrorMessage}, relevance_comment = #{relevanceComment}, quality_comment = #{qualityComment}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE speaking_record SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE speaking_record SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE speaking_record SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE speaking_record SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id, sr.session_id, sr.question_id, sr.audio_url, sr.transcript, sr.fluency_and_coherence, sr.lexical_resource, sr.grammatical_range_and_accuracy, sr.pronunciation, sr.overall_score, sr.feedback, sr.answer_status, sr.is_deleted, sr.deleted_time, sr.ai_status, sr.ai_provider, sr.ai_model, sr.ai_error_message, sr.relevance_comment, sr.quality_comment, sr.created_time, sr.updated_time FROM speaking_record sr WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} AND sr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sr.created_time DESC, sr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT AVG(overall_score) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND overall_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM speaking_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ai_status = 'FAILED'
